instruction: The bolt icon is being clipped by a 64x64 canvas. Expand the viewBox to 128x128.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 64 64" width="64" height="64">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="64" height="64" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/bolt.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m3.75 13.5 10.5-11.25L12 10.5h8.25L9.75 21.75 12 13.5H3.75Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/bolt.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m3.75 13.5 10.5-11.25L12 10.5h8.25L9.75 21.75 12 13.5H3.75Z"/></g>
</svg>
